subject: New Opening: Microservices Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Digitalsverige
ROLE: Mid Microservices Engineer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Malmö / remote
RATE: 800 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, AWS and MySQL.

Key requirements:
• Java
• AWS
• MySQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Lena Eriksson
Business Director
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 73 345 67 89
